name: Gus Cannon
abstract: Gustavus "Gus" Cannon (September 12, 1883 – October 15, 1979) was an American blues musician who helped to popularize jug bands (such as his own Cannon's Jug Stompers) in the 1920s and 1930s. There is uncertainty about his birth year; his tombstone gives the date as 1874.

about_quotes.speaker: Angola Talking
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ...You know Gus Cannon, Will Shea, Ben Ramey? [INTERVIEWEE] I know Bill Ramey. Yeah.

about_quotes.speaker: Walter "Furry" Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: I and Gus was in New York together. Me and him and a cellar called Mrs. Willie B.
